title: Total Posts
description: Number of posts in selected time range
viz_content: SELECT count(*) AS total_posts FROM [[ .DB ]].bluesky_posts WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}}

title: Unique Posters
description: Distinct users who posted in selected time range
viz_content: SELECT count(distinct did) AS unique_users FROM [[ .DB ]].bluesky_posts WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}}

title: Total Activity Events
description: All commit events (posts, likes, follows, reposts) in selected time range
viz_content: SELECT count(*) AS total_events FROM [[ .DB ]].bluesky_activity WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}}

title: Engagement Timeline (per minute)
description: Posts, likes, follows, and reposts over time
viz_content: SELECT window_start AS time, count_if(collection = 'app.bsky.feed.post') AS posts, count_if(collection = 'app.bsky.feed.like') AS likes, count_if(collection = 'app.bsky.graph.follow') AS follows, count_if(collection = 'app.bsky.feed.repost') AS reposts FROM tumble([[ .DB ]].bluesky_activity, 1m) WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}} GROUP BY window_start

title: Post Volume (5-second windows)
description: Number of posts per 5-second tumbling window
viz_content: SELECT window_start AS time, count(*) AS posts, count(distinct did) AS unique_posters FROM tumble([[ .DB ]].bluesky_posts, 5s) WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}} GROUP BY window_start

title: Posts by Language
viz_content: SELECT if(lang = '' OR lang IS NULL, 'unknown', lang) AS language, count(*) AS post_count FROM tumble([[ .DB ]].bluesky_posts, 1m) WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}} GROUP BY window_start, language ORDER BY post_count DESC LIMIT 10

title: Top Active Posters
description: Users with highest post counts in selected time range
viz_content: SELECT window_start AS time, did, count(*) AS post_count FROM tumble([[ .DB ]].bluesky_posts, 5m) WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}} GROUP BY window_start, did HAVING post_count >= 2 ORDER BY post_count DESC LIMIT 15

title: Live Post Feed
description: Most recent posts from the Bluesky firehose
viz_content: SELECT did, if(lang = '' OR lang IS NULL, 'unknown', lang) AS lang, post_type, left(text, 200) AS text, _tp_time FROM [[ .DB ]].bluesky_posts WHERE _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}}
